benchmark_details.name: SuperCLUE-Safety (SC-Safety)
benchmark_details.overview: SC-Safety is a multi-round adversarial benchmark designed to assess the safety of Chinese large language models. It features 4912 open-ended questions covering over 20 safety sub-dimensions, aiming to reflect real-world interactive scenarios and enhance safety measures against instruction attacks and irresponsible AI.

purpose_and_intended_users.goal: To systematically evaluate and improve the safety characteristics of large language models used in Chinese through comprehensive safety assessments.

data.source: Adversarially constructed datasets derived from interactions between humans and models, focusing on real-world safety applications.
data.annotation: Manually curated and synthetically generated using adversarial questioning techniques.

methodology.calculation: Evaluated based on responses from models to open-ended questions, focusing on safety and responsibility measures.
methodology.interpretation: Scores indicate levels of safety and adherence to moral and legal guidelines; higher scores denote better compliance and safety.
methodology.baseline_results: Comparison of 13 major Chinese LLMs evaluated against SC-Safety metrics, including closed-source and open-source models.
methodology.validation: The benchmark was validated through consistency checks against automated and human evaluations focusing on potential safety risks.
